notes: 3.11.31 — THEM DONG TIEN RUB: (1) OP_CURRENCIES +RUB → tu dong lan ra ≥8 dropdown (thu-chi ho, phi feeCcy, MR, bao cao ngoai te); (2) them option RUB vao 4 form hard-code: Dong tien (cf-ccy), Tai khoan ngan hang (ba-ccy), Khoan vay (ln-ccy), Thu ho chu tau.
